notes:
Batch-E: app/src/workspace/view.rs + app/src/workspace/view/vertical_tabs.rs — 65 entries total (47 view.rs + 18 vertical_tabs.rs). 61 UI translations + 3 panic_message flags + 1 telemetry_payload flag.

Panic/expect strings (target=null):
- 'Expect server id on success' — .expect() at view.rs:16489.
- 'IPaneType::Terminal must correspond to a TerminalPane' — .expect() at vertical_tabs.rs:3220.
- 'IPaneType::Code must correspond to a CodePane' — .expect() at vertical_tabs.rs:3224.

Telemetry (target=null):
- '[FOR PERFORMANCE BOT] Dev took performance sample with results: ' — sentry::capture_message at view.rs:22981. Pure telemetry sink for the perf-bot pipeline.

Notable translation decisions / cross-file consistency:
- 'tab' → '标签页' consistently across both files ('Tabs panel'/'No tabs open'/'Untitled tab'/'Tab item'/'No tabs match your search'/'synchronized inputs in all tabs'/'in this tab').
- 'pane' → '窗格' ('Pane title as' → '窗格标题显示为').
- 'panel' → '面板' ('Agent management panel'/'Code review panel'/'Tabs panel').
- 'Handoff'-related strings: mirrored batch-14 C — kept '转交' terminology in PRD context (no specific handoff strings in this batch's E, but environment-creation toast at L13357 belongs to the 'HandoffEnvironmentCreationModalEvent::CreationFailed' branch, translated as '创建环境失败' since it's the environment-side error, not the handoff verb).
- '{verb}' placeholder filled by English 'enabled'/'disabled' at runtime — per contract §2, restructured Chinese to surround the placeholder neutrally: '鼠标上报 {verb}。' / '同步输入到所有标签页 {verb}。' / '当前标签页内同步输入 {verb}。'.
- ' Press {} to undo.' — preserved leading whitespace exactly ('  按 {} 撤销。' with leading space).
- 'Linear Issue' → 'Linear 工单' (Linear is a product name; Issue → 工单 per Linear's own Chinese terminology).
- 'Oz' / 'Codex' / 'Warp' / 'Warp Drive' / 'Warp AI' / 'OpenCode' / 'opencode.json' / 'GitHub CLI' / 'PR' / 'settings.toml' / 'diff' — preserved as-is.
- 'Hello, Agent Mode x Codex!' — user-facing initial prompt sent to AI; translated to '您好，Agent 模式 x Codex！'.
- 'My settings.toml file has an error: ... Please fix it.' — pre-filled user-side AI prompt; translated to Chinese since the LLM understands Chinese and the user sees this text.
- 'View as' → '显示方式' (popup menu header — what to display as).
- 'Execution Profile' → '执行配置' (a workspace pane kind label; profile here is a config preset).
- 'Code Diff' → '代码差异' (consistent with prior batches).
- 'Diff stats' → 'diff 统计' (per glossary: 'diff stats' → 'diff 统计').
- 'Sampling process for 3 seconds...' / 'Process sample saved to {output_path}' / 'Failed to sample process (check logs)' — added via DismissibleToast → UI text → translated. The trailing '...' was converted to '……'.
- Banner texts ('A new version is available...' / 'Warp was unable to launch...' / 'Some features may be unavailable offline' / 'Sign in' / 'Update now' / 'Restart app and update now') — all WorkspaceBanner/Toast UI strings.
- 'Introducing Oz' → '了解 Oz' (modal title; '了解' more natural than '介绍' for a feature-discovery modal).
- Placeholders preserved verbatim ({error_message}, {error_description}, {output_path}, {e}, {new_entry}, {verb}, {}); brand literals (Warp, Warp Drive, MCP, GitHub, Linear, Codex, OpenCode, Agent) preserved; ASCII '...' → '……' throughout; all whitespace preserved (leading space on ' Press {} to undo.').
